backend/main.mo: Main actor implementing clip management, user profiles, trending analytics, and access control with functions for saving/deleting clips, calculating viral scores, and managing user permissions.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module with a simple run function that returns the old actor state unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the addition of comprehensive console logging in App.tsx admin route for debugging isAdmin boolean values and authentication flow.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files including components, hooks, and configuration files.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with custom OKLCH color system defining light and dark mode theme variables for the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with page title "Beast Clipping" and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application with TanStack Router setup, managing video playback, clip selection, AI suggestions state, and admin route protection with extensive debug logging.
frontend/src/components/AdminErrorBounda: React error boundary component that catches and displays admin panel errors with retry and home navigation options.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard component displaying system statistics (total clips, trending clips) and a detailed analytics table with loading states and error handling.
frontend/src/components/ClipCard.tsx: Displays a single clip as a card with thumbnail, title, duration, viral score badge, and delete functionality with confirmation dialog. Supports selection state and click handling.
frontend/src/components/ClipList.tsx: Renders a scrollable list of saved clips using ClipCard components, with loading states, empty state messaging, and clip selection/deletion handlers.
Shows either AI-generated clip suggestions or trending viral clips with viral scores, timestamps, and action buttons to use suggested clips.
frontend/src/components/ClipTimestampCon: Form component for creating clips with title input and start/end timestamp controls (minutes/seconds), supporting both manual entry and loading from selected or suggested clips.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout with header containing branding, authentication button (login/logout), and conditional admin panel link for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/VideoUrlForm.tsx: Form for entering YouTube URLs with validation, video loading, and AI clip generation button that triggers auto-generation of clip suggestions.
Badge component displaying viral score percentage with color-coded styling and icons (flame/trending/sparkles) based on score thresholds (80+, 50+, below 50).
frontend/src/components/YouTubePlayer.ts: A React component that renders a responsive YouTube video player embedded in a Card component using an iframe with a 16:9 aspect ratio.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication, initializes access control with an admin token from URL params, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Custom hook that fetches admin statistics including total clips count and trending clips analytics from the backend actor.
Custom hook that provides auto-generation of clip suggestions with viral scores; currently uses mock AI data but is designed to integrate with real AI services in the future.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipCreation.ts: Custom hook that handles clip creation with a viral score calculation based on duration and title characteristics, then saves the clip via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useClips.ts: Custom hook that fetches all clips from the backend and provides a delete mutation with loading state tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipTimestamps.ts: Custom hook that manages clip start/end timestamps in minutes and seconds format, provides validation, formatting, and conversion utilities.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts: Custom hook that checks if the current authenticated user is an admin by calling the backend's isCallerAdmin method, with extensive logging for debugging.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrendingClips.ts: Custom hook that fetches trending clips from the backend actor using React Query.
Custom hook that provides utilities to validate YouTube URLs and extract video IDs using regex patterns.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors including primary, secondary, accent, and chart colors using oklch color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, typography, container queries, animations, and design tokens for a consistent UI theme.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for a YouTube video clipping application called 'Beast Clipping', documenting completed features, known issues (including admin panel access denial for authenticated owners), and architectural notes.
